name: Ambassador
instructions: Reveal a card from your hand. Return up to 2 copies of it from your hand to the Supply. Then each other player gains a copy of it.

name: Astrolabe
instructions:
Now and at the start of your next turn:
$1
+1 Buy

name: Bazaar
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
+$1

name: Blockade
instructions:
Gain a card costing up to $4, setting it aside.
At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand. While it's set aside, when another player gains a copy of it on their turn, they gain a Curse.

name: Caravan
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Corsair
instructions:
+$2
At the start of your next turn, +1 Card. Until then, each other player trashes the first Silver or Gold they play each turn.

name: Cutpurse
instructions:
+$2
Each other player discards a Copper (or reveals a hand with no Copper).

name: Embargo
instructions:
+$2
Trash this to add an Embargo token to a Supply pile. (For the rest of the game, when a player buys a card from that pile, they gain a Curse.)

name: Explorer
instructions: You may reveal a Province from your hand. If you do, gain a Gold to your hand. If you don't, gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Fishing Village
instructions:
+2 Actions
+$1
At the start of your next turn: +1 Action and +$1.

name: Ghost Ship
instructions:
+2 Cards
Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand puts cards from their hand onto their deck until they have 3 cards in hand.

name: Haven
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Set aside a card from your hand face down (under this). At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Island
instructions:
Put this and a card from your hand onto your Island mat.
-----
2 VP

name: Lighthouse
instructions:
+1 Action
+$1
At the start of your next turn, +$1. Until then, when another player plays an Attack card, it doesn't affect you.

name: Lookout
instructions:
+1 Action
Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Trash one of them. Discard one of them. Put the other one back on top of your deck.

name: Merchant Ship
instructions: Now and at the start of your next turn: +$2.

name: Monkey
instructions:
Until your next turn, when the player to your right gains a card, +1 Card.
At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Native Village
instructions:
+2 Actions
Choose one: Put the top card of your deck face down on your Native Village mat (you may look at those cards at any time); or put all the cards from your mat into your hand.

name: Navigator
instructions:
+$2
Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Either discard them all, or put them back in any order.

name: Outpost
instructions: You only draw 3 cards for your next hand. Take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row).

name: Pearl Diver
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Look at the bottom card of your deck. You may put it on top.

name: Pirate
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, gain a Treasure costing up to $6 to your hand.
-----
When any player gains a Treasure, you may play this from your hand.

name: Pirate Ship
instructions: Choose one: +$1 per Coin token on your Pirate Ship mat; or each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of those Treasures that you choose, and discards the rest, and then if anyone trashed a Treasure, you add a Coin token to your Pirate Ship mat.

name: Sailor
instructions:
+1 Action
Once this turn, when you gain a Duration card, you may play it.
At the start of your next turn, +$2 and you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Salvager
instructions:
+1 Buy
Trash a card from your hand. +$1 per $1 it costs.

name: Sea Chart
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top card of your deck. If you have a copy of it in play, put it into your hand.

name: Sea Hag
instructions: Each other player discards the top card of their deck, then gains a Curse onto their deck.

name: Sea Witch
instructions:
+2 Cards
Each other player gains a Curse.
At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards, then discard 2 cards.

name: Smugglers
instructions: Gain a copy of a card costing up to $6 that the player to your right gained on their last turn.

name: Tactician
instructions: If you have at least one card in hand: Discard your hand, and at the start of your next turn, +5 Cards, +1 Action, and +1 Buy.

name: Tide Pools
instructions:
+3 Cards
+1 Action
At the start of your next turn, discard 2 cards.

name: Treasure Map
instructions: Trash this and a Treasure Map from your hand. If you trashed two Treasure Maps, gain 4 Golds onto your deck.

name: Treasury
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+$1When you discard this from play, if you didn't gain any Victory cards in your Buy phase this turn, you may put this onto your deck.

name: Warehouse
instructions:
+3 Cards
+1 Action
Discard 3 cards.

name: Wharf
instructions: Now and at the start of your next turn: +2 Cards and +1 Buy.
